name: Scallops with Mushrooms in Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
2. Melt 1/4 cup of butter in a small skillet. Add the mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until wilted and liquid is released. Add shallots and garlic; cook briefly.
3. Spoon mushroom mixture into a mixing bowl. Let cool slightly. Add remaining butter, scallops, bread crumbs, parsley, salt, and pepper to taste. Blend well.
4. Fill 6 seafood shells with the prepared mixture. Arrange filled shells on a baking dish or cookie sheet.
5. Melt remaining butter over shells; pour over filling in shells. Place back into oven.
6. Brown scallops under broiler for about 1 minute, turning occasionally.
7. Makes 6 servings.
